title: DfE Update: 15 October 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action Register for national professional qualifications   Information Apprenticeship assessment changes coming   Information Department for Education payments for Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund     Latest for academies     Article Title     Action Submit your audited financial statements for 2024 to 2025 by 31 December 2025   Information Accounts submission coversheet virtual assistant   Information Schools budget support grant allocations and conditions of grant for financial year 2025 to 2026   Information Core schools budget grant allocations for special schools   Information Apprenticeship assessment changes coming   Information Department for Education payments for Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund   Your feedback Help us to shape the future of how you interact with Department for Education, and DfE Connect   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return for 2024 to 2025   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return for 2024 to 2025   Events and webinars Autumn term webinars and power hours for school business professionals     Latest for local authorities     Article Title     Information Schools budget support grant allocations and conditions of grant for financial year 2025 to 2026   Information Core schools budget grant allocations for special schools   Information Apprenticeship assessment changes coming   Information Department for Education payments for Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund   Events and webinars Autumn term webinars and power hours for school business professionals    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
